accepted: closed interoperable contents for brief text, status, SOS and location
bearer-independent application security and incident-scoped identity
append-only distress lifecycle with distinct technical, human and operational state
deterministic SOS semantic replay across ten input orders
zero false operator acceptance and zero silent distress discard
possible distress preservation without automatic authentication
not_accepted: RF delivery, latency, range or message success rate
human comprehension, accessibility or stress performance
hardware key custody, theft resistance or secure wipe
OS-05 or later Open Spec tasks
